tasks.label: Initialize venv
tasks.command: python3 -m venv backend/venv && python3 -m venv frontend/venv

windows.command: python -m venv backend/venv && python -m venv frontend/venv

tasks.label: Install Dependencies
tasks.command: backend/venv/bin/python -m pip install -r backend/requirements.txt && frontend/venv/bin/python -m pip install -r frontend/requirements.txt

windows.command: .\backend\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r backend\requirements.txt && .\frontend\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r frontend\requirements.txt
